resolved_requirements.core_objective: hit the ball back and forth
resolved_requirements.lose_condition: allow the ball to pass your paddle 3 times
resolved_requirements.sound: simple sound effects for hits and scores

plan.game_concept: A simple 2D game where the player controls a spaceship to avoid incoming asteroids and collect stars for points.
plan.framework_rationale: Simple mechanics achievable with Canvas API; fewer dependencies = more reliable generation

core_mechanics.name: Player Movement
core_mechanics.description: The player can move the spaceship left and right using keyboard controls.

core_mechanics.name: Asteroid Spawning
core_mechanics.description: Asteroids spawn from the top of the screen at random x positions and fall downwards.

core_mechanics.name: Star Collection
core_mechanics.description: Stars appear randomly and can be collected by the player for points.

game_loop.init_description: Initialize game variables, create player and spawn initial asteroids and stars.
game_loop.update_description: Update player position, check for collisions, spawn new asteroids and stars, and update score.
game_loop.render_description: Clear the canvas and redraw the player, asteroids, and stars.

entities.name: Player
entities.description: The spaceship controlled by the player.

entities.name: Asteroid
entities.description: Falling obstacles that the player must avoid.

entities.name: Star
entities.description: Items that the player can collect for points.

plan.difficulty_curve: Increase asteroid spawn rate over time.
plan.css_spec: body { margin: 0; } canvas { background: #000; display: block; margin: auto; }
plan.js_architecture: All game logic in a single script file.
acceptance_checks: Player can move left and right
Stars spawn and can be collected
Game resets after collision with asteroid
Score updates correctly when collecting stars

game_files.index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Simple Catch Game</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="800" height="600"></canvas>
    <script src="game.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
